title: MusyX TUs port from AxioDL/musyx (CC0) — pin the version and respect the inline/pack traps
summary: src/musyx/* (and the mis-attributed people_field.c audio range) is the MusyX audio runtime. Source is CC0 in AxioDL/musyx. Compiler is the GC/1.3.2 MusyX MWCC. Known traps carried in the trick-musyx-* standards: pack(4) on u64 struct fields, in-TU auto-inline duplication, -inline auto refuses loop-containing fns (hand-inline them), and version pins 2.0.0/2.0.1.
do: Port from AxioDL/musyx at the pinned version, then diff against target asm.
Apply the trick-musyx-slice1/slice3/slice5 findings (pack(4), inline-auto, named-local reload) before grinding.
See wall-mcmd-CLOSED-and-musyx-struct-corrections for the members that are source-unfixable.
do_not: Do not hand-write MusyX from asm — the CC0 source is authoritative.
Do not fight the mcmd struct wall; it is CLOSED (source-unfixable).
